claim: Gemini 2.5 Flash (Nano Banana) excels at extracting 3D objects from images and generating 3D isometric representations with few hallucinations
actionable: Use Nano Banana for 3D asset generation from photos; especially good for extracting buildings and creating game assets
source_title: The Industry Reacts to Gemini 2.5 Flash Image

claim: Nano Banana can locate and annotate points of interest in images using only vision + world knowledge; combines visual detection with semantic understanding
actionable: Use for location-based AR experiences by uploading screenshots; model can detect buildings, landmarks, and return metadata
source_title: The Industry Reacts to Gemini 2.5 Flash Image

claim: Nano Banana struggles with font text generation and face replacement (refuses to blend faces realistically)
actionable: Don't rely on Nano Banana for text rendering or face morphing; use other models for typography and facial features
source_title: The Industry Reacts to Gemini 2.5 Flash Image

claim: Nano Banana is good at photo restoration and can infer details from low-resolution images (though taking liberties with what buildings might look like)
actionable: Use for restoring old/degraded photos where some creative inference is acceptable
source_title: The Industry Reacts to Gemini 2.5 Flash Image
